title: SonarAutoFixJobMessage
description: Payload published to the Azure Service Bus queue to trigger one Sonar Auto-Fix pipeline run.

excel_url.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL of the SonarQube Excel export (.xlsx). Use an Azure Blob SAS URL or any publicly/privately accessible URL. The container downloads the file at runtime.

repo.description: HTTPS clone URL of the target Git repository (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo.git).

branch.description: Git branch to check out, fix, and target as the Pull Request base (e.g. 'main', 'dev').

pat.description: GitHub Personal Access Token for push and PR creation. SECURITY: prefer setting GITHUB_PAT as an environment variable via Key Vault reference instead of including it in the message.

github_token.description: GitHub token for the Copilot SDK. Defaults to 'pat' when omitted. SECURITY: prefer GITHUB_TOKEN env var via Key Vault reference.

model.description: Copilot SDK model identifier. Omit or set to 'auto' to use the model configured in the Copilot CLI.

rules.description: SonarQube rule key(s) to process. Omit to process all rules found in the Excel export.

severity.description: Minimum severity threshold. Issues below this level are skipped. Omit to process all severities.

pr_title.description: Custom Pull Request title. Auto-generated when omitted.

pr_body.description: Custom Pull Request body (Markdown). Auto-generated when omitted.

timeout.description: Per-issue Copilot agent timeout in seconds. Default: 300 (5 min).

log_level.description: Python logging level for the job run.

examples._comment: Minimal — secrets come from Container Apps Job env vars (Key Vault)
Full example with all optional fields
